title: CLI
description: Look up every published you-agent-factory CLI command from the installed package CLI contract on a stable static docs route.
openingSummary: This reference lists every published CLI command from the installed @you-agent-factory/api CLI contract so integrators can look up command paths, help text, and package-backed metadata without a live Factory host.

whatItCovers.title: What It Covers
whatItCovers.body: This reference publishes the package-backed CLI command inventory for you-agent-factory. Readers can look up every published command path from the installed CLI contract, including available descriptions, examples, lifecycle and visibility metadata, runnable and handler presence when the package publishes them, stable anchors, and inventory filters.

keyConcepts.title: Key Concepts
keyConcepts.body: A CLI command path is the full published invocation string, such as you config init. The inventory comes from the installed @you-agent-factory/api/cli public export, not from a page-local copy of commands. Lifecycle and visibility describe how the package marks a command when those fields are present. When structured flags or arguments are absent from the published contract, the inventory discloses that limit instead of inventing option rows.

commandInventory.title: Command Inventory
commandInventory.body: Scan the published CLI commands below. Filter by command path, alias, description, lifecycle, or visibility when those facets are present on a command. Open a command card for package-backed metadata and copy its stable anchor when you need a deep link.
